result.reason: New and reconnected tabs are always placed at the end of the tab strip, which can be disorienting. Changing this to insert next to the active tab will improve user experience.
result.approach: Modify the `AddConnectionTab` method in `ConnectionWindow.cs` to insert new `ConnectionTab` instances next to the currently active tab in the `connDock` using an indexed `Show` overload, rather than always appending to the end.
